matching.failed_to_save_configuration: No se pudo guardar la configuración
matching.match_approvals_desc: Revisar y aprobar o rechazar coincidencias generadas por el motor de coincidencias inteligente
matching.matching_analytics_desc: Ver distribuciones de puntuación de partidos, tasas de aprobación y datos de distancia
matching.matching_config_desc: Configurar pesos de algoritmo y ajustes para el motor de coincidencia inteligente
matching.matching_configuration_saved_successfull: La configuración coincidente se guardó correctamente
matching.no_matching_data_desc: Aún no hay datos coincidentes disponibles
matching.placeholder_explain_why_this_match_is_be: Explique por qué se rechaza esta coincidencia...
matching.please_provide_a_reason_for_rejection: Por favor proporcione una razón para el rechazo.
matching.proximity_bands_desc: Definir bandas de distancia utilizadas para calificar la proximidad geográfica entre miembros
matching.reset_defaults_confirm: ¿Está seguro de que desea restablecer todos los pesos a sus valores predeterminados?
matching.smart_matching_enabled_desc: Habilite o deshabilite el motor de coincidencia inteligente para este inquilino
matching.smart_matching_overview_desc: Descripción general de la actividad de coincidencia inteligente, aprobaciones y puntuaciones de coincidencia

matching.match_could_not_be_loaded: No se pudo cargar la partida
matching.no_pending_match_approvals: No hay aprobaciones de partidos pendientes
matching.hard_distance_gate_desc: Remote and hybrid listings are exempt; physical listings beyond the max distance are excluded from matches

matching.missing_coords_mode_remote_only: Remote matches only + prompt to set location
matching.dormancy_days_desc: Days of inactivity before a member is excluded from matching (0 = off)
matching.owner_dismissal_threshold_desc: Number of dismissals by a listing owner before similar matches are suppressed
matching.ai_semantic_matching_desc: Use AI-generated embeddings to improve match relevance beyond keyword overlap
matching.ai_match_explanations_desc: Generate a short natural-language explanation for top matches
matching.explanation_top_n_desc: How many top matches per member get an AI-generated explanation (1-10)
matching.gate_impact_desc: How location data quality and matching gates affect the eligible pool
matching.label_degraded_members_desc: Members matched with reduced accuracy due to missing location data
matching.feedback_reasons_desc: Why members are dismissing suggested matches
matching.pillar_averages_desc: Average score contribution per matching pillar across recent matches
